metadata.name: mcp_integration_demo
metadata.description: MCP tool integration demo: browse, store, analyze, and save using MCP servers

data.task: Navigate to {url} using the Playwright MCP server. Take a screenshot. Extract the page title, main content, and any relevant data. Store each key finding as an entity in the memory knowledge graph.

Analyze the extracted content based on the task: '{task}'. Identify key information, summarize findings, and create relationships between entities in the knowledge graph. Search for any related existing findings.
Generate a markdown summary combining all findings. Save the report to /tmp/mcp_demo_report.md using the filesystem MCP server. Include: Page URL, title, key findings, and task-specific analysis.
